channel.title: GitHub Blog on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Blog on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: MAI-Code-1-Flash available on more Copilot surfaces
item.description:
MAI-Code-1-Flash is now available in additional GitHub Copilot surfaces. The model can be used in Copilot CLI, the GitHub Copilot app, Copilot Chat on GitHub, and Visual Studio Code.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Upcoming deprecation of GPT-4.1
item.description:
GitHub will deprecate GPT-4.1 across all Copilot experiences on 2026-06-01. Users are directed to switch to the suggested alternative model.

  • Source: GitHub
